changes.motivation: Increase memory allocation for the Argo Workflows executor (exec) container to better handle workloads that were likely hitting the previous lower limits.
changes.summary: Updated executor container memory resources in `packages/infrastructure/kube_argo/main.tf`: request increased from 50Mi to 75Mi, limit increased from 70Mi to 100Mi. The accompanying auto-generated Terraform reference docs in `packages/website/src/content/docs/main/modules/kube_argo/reference.mdx` were updated automatically by a post-edit hook.

problems: The agent attempted to run `show-diff.ts` as a bare command multiple times (via `which`, `find`, and `locate`) before discovering its path via Glob. The script lives at `.claude/skills/changelog/scripts/show-diff.ts` but is not in PATH, so plain invocations failed. A comment or README near the script noting that it must be invoked with its full path (or via `bun`/`ts-node`) would prevent repeated failed lookups.
